description: Standard: US profile with defamation risks

input.draft_text:

C) 'Webb was investigated by the SEC in 2022.'

A) 'Councillor Sarah Bennett used her position to steer a £3 million contract to a firm owned by her brother-in-law.'
B) 'Former council staff describe Bennett as corrupt.'
C) 'Bennett was referred to the Standards Commission, which found no breach of the code of conduct.'
D) 'Financial records obtained under a Freedom of Information request show three payments to the firm that were not listed in the council's procurement register.'
